name: Agent Development
tagline: Reference guide for authoring Claude Code plugin subagents: frontmatter fields, triggering examples, and system-prompt design.
verdict: Safe documentation skill with no commands, network access, or manipulation attempts, and well-specified templates with concrete validation rules and examples. Notable defects: the frontmatter `name` is 'Agent Development' (spaces and capitals, not kebab-case), there is no out-of-scope statement distinguishing it from the sibling Command Development skill.

highlights.summary: No exclusion/out-of-scope text anywhere; doesn't distinguish itself from the sibling Command Development skill.
No guidance for a failed agent-triggering test or errors from scripts/validate-agent.sh; happy-path only.
Frontmatter `name: Agent Development` uses spaces and capital letters, not kebab-case.
